name: Savory Buttamilk Veggie Waffles
intro: These savory waffles go perfectly with some Bronx Fried Oyster Mushrooms for a mock chicken and waffles moment. With a few alternatives, you easily get the best-tasting waffle ever. You can add fruits, or you could add some herbs and cheese. And since I’m such a savory girl, mine will have some herbs and some veggies.

ingredients.item: Nonstick oil spray or vegan butter, for waffle maker

method: To make your buttermilk, in a bowl, combine the nondairy milk and apple cider vinegar and let it sit out to curdle for about 30 minutes.

In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt and raw cane sugar. Then, add the coconut oil, JUST Egg, vanilla extract, vegan Cheddar cheese and broccoli, and stir, but do not overmix. You want the batter to be a bit thick. Adjust the flour and water accordingly.

Turn on your waffle maker and spray it with nonstick oil spray or butter it up with vegan butter. Add about ¾ cup (180 ml) or less of batter, depending on the size of your waffle maker, and let it cook thoroughly. Do not open the waffle maker before the batter cooks all the way through, because it will stick and fall apart. This is important!
When the waffle is fully cooked, remove it and repeat with more batter. Serve with my Bronx Fried Oster Mushrooms and syrup. Cheers.
